query_support.where_is: lookup.by_path[path] or lookup.by_id[id] — path, type, status
query_support.what_generates_this: lookup.*.generated_by — assets whose outputs include this id
query_support.what_depends_on_this: lookup.*.depended_on_by — assets that list this id in depends_on
query_support.who_created_this: lookup.*.created_by — mission or actor from assets.yaml

how_does_ai_dos_execute_work.answer: Execution Engine produces plans in system/execution-plans/. Operator approves; workers execute manually.
